case_title: SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION VS LOPEZ, JAVIER MR.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-01-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF FEB-05-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
